evals.prompt: No workflow profile exists yet. Onboard me with tags [review, mechanism, to-cite], triage_mode deep, and note fields [TL;DR, Evidence quality, Citation sentence, Where to cite].
evals.expected_output: Creates user-workflow.yaml with requested tags, triage mode, and note fields; returns active workflow summary.

evals.prompt: Update my existing workflow so high confidence does not require full text and add custom tag benchmark-paper.
evals.expected_output: Applies minimal profile changes, keeps existing keys, and reports exact updated fields.

evals.prompt: My profile has triage_mode='detailed' and empty note_template.fields. Fix it without deleting unrelated settings.
evals.expected_output: Validation failure is identified and corrected with allowed values while preserving unrelated profile content.
